description: Style Note lucera, or & lsquo luminous star& rsquo in Spanish, is designed for fashionistas who like to shine! Lucera fashion jewellery offers contemporary designs to complement the various moods of the modern and fashion conscious woman of today. What makes these earrings a must buy is the fact that these earrings are easily paired and will match most of the outfits in your wardrobe in elegance and style. Product Details Silver coloured earrings Floral CZ diamond studded base Two diamond shaped patterns with CZ diamonds encrusted with a big CZ studded floral detail dangling Push back closure Material and Care Silver and CZ Diamonds Wipe with a cotton swab when needed
